summary: PC is dual-boot-capable, but install space is not prepared yet.

observed.disk1: PNY CS900 500GB SSD, GPT, 466 GB, Healthy

warnings: Not running elevated; BitLocker, Secure Boot, reagentc, and BCD checks may be incomplete.
Secure Boot status could not be read without elevation or firmware support.
Only 0.0 GB unallocated. Windows is dual-boot-capable, but the Linux installer will need unallocated space.
BitLocker was not checked because this shell is not elevated.
nextPhysicalActions: Run dual-boot/Test-DualBootReadiness.ps1 from an elevated PowerShell.
Back up important files and confirm Windows recovery media.
Back up BitLocker recovery keys if BitLocker is enabled.
Use Windows Disk Management to shrink D: and create 100-250 GB unallocated space.
Rerun readiness validation and confirm readyForInstall becomes true.
Only then boot NixOS USB and follow dual-boot/INSTALL-CHECKLIST.md.
hardBoundary: No script in this repo may resize partitions, mutate BCD, change firmware boot order, format disks, or install an OS unattended.
